name: Motor Driver Integrated Circuit (IC)
shortDescription: A motor driver Integrated Circuit (IC) controls the direction and speed of a motor, typically using an H-bridge.
whatIsIt: A motor driver IC controls the direction and speed of a motor, typically using an H-bridge.
whyExists: MCUs can't directly drive motor currents; drivers provide the power interface.
whereUsed: Used in robots, drones, and toys with Direct Current (DC)/stepper motors.
